hero.headline: Designing learning experiences that work for everyone — not just the average
hero.description: I'm Tobias Treppmann, a design leader with 15+ years of experience building inclusive systems. I believe the same empathy that drives great product design must drive great education design — especially when AI enters the classroom.

aboutSnippet: Deep experience in inclusive design and accessibility — from designing for neurodivergent team members to privacy-first products in regulated environments. Education and mentoring are core to my practice: I teach at CareerFoundry and lead AI design workshops.
designChopsHighlight: Complex system design that makes the hard feel simple — proven in multi-stakeholder environments with diverse user needs.
leadershipAngle: I've spent 15+ years building inclusive teams that reflect the diversity of their users. The same principles apply to education: different minds need different systems.

content.relevanceNote: Multi-stakeholder coordination and progressive disclosure — directly applicable to complex learning platforms
Inclusive design for cognitive diversity — foundational for accessible education technology
Human-centered leadership philosophy — building teams that design for everyone
AI-first process for rapid prototyping — relevant for AI-enhanced learning experiences
